hypothesis: A material first-30/60-minute ATR-normalized displacement of one US index relative to the other two may exhibit intraday convergence or lead-lag continuation.

execution_contract.feature: For each index, completed-window close minus session open divided by its own ATR at that completed close; target signal is target feature minus the mean of both peer features.
execution_contract.entry: Target-index next M15 bar open after the completed synchronized window.

selection_contract.preholdout_gate: DEV trades>=150 PF>=1.15 net>0; validation trades>=25 PF>=1.05 net>0; at least four positive development years
selection_contract.selection: One global family winner by the lower of development and validation PF.
selection_contract.holdout_open_rule: Only a preholdout survivor may be recomputed through 2025.
selection_contract.holdout_gate: trades>=50 PF>=1.10 net>0 and both 2024 and 2025 positive

label: RESEARCH_ONLY_NO_GO
